---
description: Create a new app for this repository.
---

# Create a New App

Use only when the user provides the app name and the official repo or docs.

Steps:
1. Read [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md).
2. Verify the exact registry tag.
3. Pick an unused port in `8800-8999`.
4. Create `config.json`, `docker-compose.yml`, `metadata/description.md`, and `metadata/logo.jpg`.
5. Run `bun test`.
